{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD input["Template String Input
'Hello {~D:Record.Name~}!'"] scan["Precedent Scan
Find all {~TAG:...~} matches"] extract["Extract Template Hash
Record.Name with tag D"] lookup["Handler Lookup
Find registered expression for {~D:"] render["Expression Render
render('Record.Name', record, ...)"] resolve["State Resolution
Resolve Record.Name from unified state"] replace["String Replacement
Replace {~D:Record.Name~} with result"] recurse["Recursive Processing
Check for remaining expressions"] output["Final Output
'Hello Alice!'"] input --> scan scan --> extract extract --> lookup lookup --> render render --> resolve resolve --> replace replace --> recurse recurse --> output style input fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#43a047,color:#333 style output fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#43a047,color:#333 style scan fill:#fce4ec,stroke:#ef5350,color:#333 style resolve fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffa726,color:#333 style render fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#ab47bc,color:#333 ","style":"notebook"}
